;<span id="Neural_creativity">neural creativity</span>
:creativity induced with the help of [[Glossary:Neural_review|neural review]]. In neural review, SuperMemo successively feeds the user with knowledge associated with a selected topic or a chosen subset of topics. When a network of conceptual [[Glossary:Link|links]] connects areas of knowledge, they form semantic space that can be explored in a neural manner that helps forming new associations and generate ideas. This process if conducive to research, invention, problem solving, etc. Metaphorically speaking, '''neural creativity''' helps emulate a thinking process in a human brain extended by knowledge stored in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]. Unlike it is the case with semantic review in SuperMemo, or simply googling for knowledge, the whole process of associating pieces of knowledge is automated. To give it a try, pick a subject and '''[[Learn menu#Go neural|Go neural]]'''. For details see: [[Neural creativity]]. See the video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ap-AT-f9Xv4 Neural Review]
